properties.name: jeap.audit.transactional-outbox.topic
properties.description: Topic to send CreateAuditRecordCommand messages to through the transactional outbox. Configure either this property or jeap.audit.transactional-outbox.topics.

properties.name: jeap.audit.transactional-outbox.topics
properties.description: Topics to send CreateAuditRecordCommand messages to through the transactional outbox. One CreateAuditRecordCommandTransactionOutboxSender bean is registered per topic and qualified with the topic name. Configure either this property or jeap.audit.transactional-outbox.topic.
